@certus(
    preconditions=["isinstance(list, (list, tuple))"],
    postconditions=[
        {"when": "all(x > 0 for x in list)",
         "guarantees": ["result == 0"]},
        {"when": "any(x <= 0 for x in list)",
         "guarantees": ["result > 0",
                        "result <= len(list)"]},
        {"when": "always",
         "guarantees": ["result == sum(1 for x in list if x <= 0)",
                        "isinstance(result, int)",
                        "result >= 0"]}
    ],
)

raw_response:
@certus(
    preconditions=["isinstance(n, int)", "n >= 0"],
    postconditions=[
        {"when": "n == 0",
         "guarantees": ["result == 3"]},
        {"when": "n == 1",
         "guarantees": ["result == 0"]},
        {"when": "n == 2",
         "guarantees": ["result == 2"]},
        {"when": "always",
         "guarantees": ["isinstance(result, int)",
                        "result >= 0"]}
    ],
)
